mapper.select:
SELECT CMS_BOARD_T.*, TRUNC(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMdd')) - TRUNC(TO_CHAR(add_date,'yyyyMMdd')) AS date_gap, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_COMMENT a WHERE a.board_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.board_idx AND a.delete_yn = 'N' ) AS comment_count FROM ( ${pagingTop} SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, title, add_id, content, user_name, user_ip, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date, file_count, preview_img, secret_yn, content_summary, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5,request_state, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category1Manage},category1) as category1_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category2Manage},category2) as category2_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category3Manage},category3) as category3_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category4Manage},category4) as category4_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category5Manage},category5) as category5_name, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS',#{request_code},request_state) as request_state_str FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn}
) A ORDER BY A.add_date DESC ${pagingBottom} ) CMS_BOARD_T

SELECT CMS_BOARD_T.*, TRUNC(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMdd')) - TRUNC(TO_CHAR(add_date,'yyyyMMdd')) AS date_gap, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_COMMENT a WHERE a.board_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.board_idx AND a.delete_yn = 'N' ) AS comment_count2, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category1Manage},category1) as category1_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category2Manage},category2) as category2_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category3Manage},category3) as category3_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category4Manage},category4) as category4_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category5Manage},category5) as category5_name, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS',#{request_code},request_state) as request_state_str, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD A WHERE A.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx AND A.group_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.group_idx AND A.board_idx != CMS_BOARD_T.board_idx AND delete_yn = 'N' ) AS comment_count FROM ( ${pagingTop} SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, title, add_id, content, user_name, user_ip, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date, file_count, preview_img, secret_yn, content_summary, file_download_count, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5,request_state FROM CMS_BOARD B WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn}
AND parent_idx = 0 ) A -- START WITH A.parent_idx = 0 -- CONNECT BY PRIOR A.board_idx = A.parent_idx -- ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.group_idx DESC, A.board_idx DESC ORDER BY A.add_date DESC, A.group_idx DESC, A.board_idx DESC ${pagingBottom} ) CMS_BOARD_T

SELECT CMS_BOARD_T.*, TRUNC(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMdd')) - TRUNC(TO_CHAR(add_date,'yyyyMMdd')) AS date_gap, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_COMMENT a WHERE a.board_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.board_idx AND a.delete_yn = 'N' ) AS comment_count FROM ( ${pagingTop} SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, title, add_id, content, user_name, user_ip, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date, file_count, preview_img, secret_yn, content_summary, file_download_count, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5,request_state, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category1Manage},category1) as category1_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category2Manage},category2) as category2_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category3Manage},category3) as category3_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category4Manage},category4) as category4_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category5Manage},category5) as category5_name, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS',#{request_code},request_state) as request_state_str FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn}
) A START WITH A.parent_idx = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR A.board_idx = A.parent_idx ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.group_idx DESC, A.board_idx DESC ${pagingBottom} ) CMS_BOARD_T

SELECT CMS_BOARD_T.*, TRUNC(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMdd')) - TRUNC(TO_CHAR(add_date,'yyyyMMdd')) AS date_gap, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_COMMENT a WHERE a.board_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.board_idx AND a.delete_yn = 'N' ) AS comment_count FROM ( ${pagingTop} SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, title, add_id, content, user_name, user_ip, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date, file_count, preview_img, secret_yn, content_summary, file_download_count, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5,request_state, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category1Manage},category1) as category1_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category2Manage},category2) as category2_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category3Manage},category3) as category3_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category4Manage},category4) as category4_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category5Manage},category5) as category5_name, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS',#{request_code},request_state) as request_state_str FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn}
) A START WITH A.parent_idx = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR A.board_idx = A.parent_idx ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.group_idx DESC, A.board_idx DESC ${pagingBottom} ) CMS_BOARD_T

SELECT TITLE, MENU_IDX FROM ( SELECT B.MENU_NAME as TITLE, MIN(MENU_IDX) AS MENU_IDX FROM CMS_BOARD A, CMS_MENU B WHERE A.MANAGE_IDX = #{manage_idx} AND A.MANAGE_IDX = B.MANAGE_IDX GROUP BY B.MENU_NAME ORDER BY MENU_IDX ASC )WHERE ROWNUM = 1

select.foreach: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT BOARD_IDX, MANAGE_IDX, GROUP_IDX, PARENT_IDX, GROUP_DEPTH, TITLE, CONTENT, PREVIEW_IMG, USER_NAME, CATEGORY1, NOTICE_YN, EBOOK_URL, NOTICE_START_DATE, NOTICE_END_DATE, VIEW_COUNT, FILE_COUNT, DELETE_ID, DELETE_DATE, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE, 0 as comment_count FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE MANAGE_IDX = #{item} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY ADD_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

mapper.select:
${pagingTop} SELECT TRUNC(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMdd')) - TRUNC(TO_CHAR(add_date,'yyyyMMdd')) AS date_gap, (select new_date_count from CMS_BOARD_MANAGE where manage_idx = #{manage_idx}) AS new_date_count, manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, view_count, notice_yn, title, add_id, add_date, preview_img, REGEXP_REPLACE(content_summary,'<[^>]*>','') as content_summary, imsi_v_1, imsi_v_2, imsi_v_3, imsi_v_4, imsi_v_5, imsi_v_6, imsi_v_7, imsi_v_8, imsi_v_9, imsi_v_10, kioskNotice_start_date, kioskNotice_end_date, kiosk_yn FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
AND imsi_v_1 = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')
AND imsi_v_1 = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -1), 'YYYY-MM')
AND ( (notice_start_date IS NULL AND notice_end_date IS NULL) OR notice_start_date <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') OR notice_end_date >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') OR (notice_start_date <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND notice_end_date >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) ) AND add_date >= add_months(sysdate,-12) AND add_date <= SYSDATE+1 ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(),board_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT decode(manage_idx,1,'geic',2,'geic',23,'geiclib',31,'geiclib',300,'geic') as context_path, decode(manage_idx,1,'52',2,'20',23,'160',31,'149',300,'111') as menu_idx, manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, view_count, notice_yn, title, add_id, add_date, preview_img, REGEXP_REPLACE(content_summary,'<[^>]*>','') as content_summary FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx IN ('1','2','23','31','300') AND delete_yn = 'N' AND notice_yn = 'Y' AND (notice_start_date <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyy-MM-dd') OR notice_start_date IS NULL) AND (notice_end_date >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyy-MM-dd') OR notice_end_date IS NULL) ORDER BY dbms_random.value ) WHERE rownum <= 4

${pagingTop} SELECT a.manage_idx, a.board_idx, a.group_idx, a.view_count, a.notice_yn, a.title, a.add_id, a.add_date, a.preview_img, b.menu_idx FROM CMS_BOARD a, CMS_MENU b WHERE a.manage_idx = b.manage_idx AND a.manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND a.delete_yn = 'N' AND a.group_depth = 0 AND a.category1 = #{dept_cd} AND b.dept_cd = #{dept_cd} ORDER BY board_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}

${pagingTop} SELECT a.manage_idx, a.board_idx, a.group_idx, a.view_count, a.notice_yn, a.title, a.add_id, a.add_date, a.preview_img, b.menu_idx FROM CMS_BOARD a, CMS_MENU b WHERE a.manage_idx = b.manage_idx AND a.manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND a.delete_yn = 'N' AND a.group_depth = 0 AND a.category1 = #{dept_cd} AND b.dept_cd = #{dept_cd} ORDER BY board_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}

SELECT CMS_BOARD_T.*, ( SELECT H.context_path FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_19, ( SELECT H.homepage_alias FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_20, ( SELECT H.homepage_alias FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_21, ( SELECT MAX(H.menu_idx) FROM CMS_MENU H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx AND H.manage_idx = M.manage_idx AND H.menu_type = 'BOARD' ) AS imsi_n_2, ( SELECT homepage_id FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx ) AS homepage_id, ( SELECT MOD(TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(homepage_id, 'h', '')),4)+1 FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx ) AS imsi_n_1 FROM ( ${pagingTop} SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, title, add_date FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx in ( SELECT manage_idx FROM cms_board_manage WHERE board_type = 'NOTICE' ) AND delete_yn = 'N' ) A ORDER BY A.add_date desc ${pagingBottom} ) CMS_BOARD_T WHERE RNUM < 6
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND delete_yn = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND parent_idx = #{board_idx}

SELECT TRUNC(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMdd')) - TRUNC(TO_CHAR(add_date,'yyyyMMdd')) AS date_gap, manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, title, add_id, user_name, user_ip, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date, secret_yn, preview_img, file_count, content_summary, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5 FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn} AND group_depth = 0 AND notice_yn = 'Y' AND (notice_start_date <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyy-MM-dd') OR notice_start_date IS NULL) AND (notice_end_date >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyy-MM-dd') OR notice_end_date IS NULL) AND kiosk_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY board_idx DESC

SELECT TRUNC(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMdd')) - TRUNC(TO_CHAR(add_date,'yyyyMMdd')) AS date_gap, manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, title, add_id, user_name, user_ip, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date, secret_yn, preview_img, file_count, content_summary, category1, category2 FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = 521 AND delete_yn = 'N' AND group_depth = 0 AND imsi_v_1 = 'Y' AND (notice_start_date <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyy-MM-dd') OR notice_start_date IS NULL) AND (notice_end_date >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyy-MM-dd') OR notice_end_date IS NULL) ORDER BY board_idx DESC

SELECT TRUNC(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMdd')) - TRUNC(TO_CHAR(add_date,'yyyyMMdd')) AS date_gap, manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, title, add_id, user_name, user_ip, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date, secret_yn, preview_img, file_count, content_summary, category1, category2 FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = 523 AND delete_yn = 'N' AND group_depth = 0 AND imsi_v_1 = 'Y' AND (notice_start_date <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyy-MM-dd') OR notice_start_date IS NULL) AND (notice_end_date >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyy-MM-dd') OR notice_end_date IS NULL) ORDER BY board_idx DESC

SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, notice_start_date, notice_end_date, title, content, add_id, user_name, user_email, user_phone, user_homepage, user_password, user_ip, user_email_receive_yn, user_sms_receive_yn, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date,secret_yn, preview_img, file_count, content_summary, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5, request_state, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category1Manage},category1) as category1_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category2Manage},category2) as category2_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category3Manage},category3) as category3_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category4Manage},category4) as category4_name, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category5Manage},category5) as category5_name, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS',#{request_code},request_state) as request_state_str, file_download_count, recommend_count, recommend_email_receive_count, report_state, ebook_url, approval_count, contrary_count, imsi_v_1, imsi_v_2, imsi_v_3, imsi_v_4, imsi_v_5, imsi_v_6, imsi_v_7, imsi_v_8, imsi_v_9, imsi_v_10, imsi_v_11,imsi_v_12,imsi_v_13,imsi_v_14,imsi_v_15, imsi_v_16,imsi_v_17,imsi_v_18,imsi_v_19,imsi_v_20, imsi_v_21,imsi_v_22, imsi_d_1, imsi_d_2 ,imsi_d_3, imsi_d_4, imsi_d_5, imsi_n_1, imsi_n_2, imsi_n_3, imsi_n_4, imsi_n_5, kiosknotice_start_date, kiosknotice_end_date, kiosk_yn, notice_start_date, notice_end_date, notice_yn FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn}

SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, notice_start_date, notice_end_date, title, content, add_id, user_name, user_email, user_phone, user_homepage, user_password, user_ip, user_email_receive_yn, user_sms_receive_yn, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date,secret_yn, preview_img, file_count, content_summary, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5, file_download_count, recommend_count, recommend_email_receive_count, report_state, ebook_url, approval_count, contrary_count, imsi_v_1 || '-' || case when length(imsi_v_2) = 1 then '0'||imsi_v_2 else imsi_v_2 end
imsi_v_1, imsi_v_2, imsi_v_3, imsi_v_4, imsi_v_5, imsi_v_6, imsi_v_7, imsi_v_8, imsi_v_9, imsi_v_10, imsi_v_11,imsi_v_12,imsi_v_13,imsi_v_14,imsi_v_15, imsi_v_16,imsi_v_17,imsi_v_18,imsi_v_19,imsi_v_20, imsi_v_21,imsi_v_22 imsi_d_1, imsi_d_2 ,imsi_d_3, imsi_d_4, imsi_d_5, imsi_n_1, imsi_n_2, imsi_n_3, imsi_n_4, imsi_n_5 FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_idx = #{board_idx} AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn}

SELECT board_idx, title, user_name, secret_yn, add_date FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_idx IN ( SELECT MAX(board_idx) FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn} AND board_idx < #{board_idx} )

SELECT board_idx, title, user_name, secret_yn, add_date FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_idx IN ( SELECT MIN(board_idx) FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn} AND board_idx > #{board_idx} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD SET view_count = NVL(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_idx = #{board_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT CMS_BOARD_IDX_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMS_BOARD ( manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, notice_yn, notice_start_date, notice_end_date, title, content, content_summary, delete_yn, user_name, add_id, user_ip, add_date, secret_yn, ilus_user_seq, ilus_user_id, kiosk_yn, kioskNotice_start_date, kioskNotice_end_date, user_password, user_homepage, user_phone, user_email, request_state, preview_img, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5, imsi_v_1, imsi_v_2, imsi_v_3, imsi_v_4, imsi_v_5, imsi_v_6, imsi_v_7, imsi_v_8, imsi_v_9, imsi_v_10, imsi_v_11, imsi_v_12, imsi_v_13, imsi_v_14, imsi_v_15, imsi_v_16, imsi_v_17, imsi_v_18, imsi_v_19, imsi_v_20, imsi_v_21, imsi_v_22, imsi_d_1, imsi_d_2, imsi_d_3, imsi_d_4, imsi_d_5, imsi_n_1, imsi_n_2, imsi_n_3, imsi_n_4, imsi_n_5 ) VALUES ( #{manage_idx}, #{board_idx}, #{group_idx}, #{parent_idx}, #{group_depth}, #{notice_yn}, #{notice_start_date}, #{notice_end_date}, #{title}, #{content}, #{content_summary}, 'N', #{user_name}, #{add_id}, #{user_ip}, SYSDATE, #{secret_yn}, #{ilus_user_seq}, #{ilus_user_id}, #{kiosk_yn}, #{kioskNotice_start_date}, #{kioskNotice_end_date}, #{user_password}, #{user_homepage}, #{user_phone}, #{user_email}, #{request_state}, #{preview_img}, #{category1}, #{category2}, #{category3}, #{category4}, #{category5}, #{imsi_v_1}, #{imsi_v_2}, #{imsi_v_3}, #{imsi_v_4}, #{imsi_v_5}, #{imsi_v_6}, #{imsi_v_7}, #{imsi_v_8}, #{imsi_v_9}, #{imsi_v_10}, #{imsi_v_11}, #{imsi_v_12}, #{imsi_v_13}, #{imsi_v_14}, #{imsi_v_15}, #{imsi_v_16}, #{imsi_v_17}, #{imsi_v_18}, #{imsi_v_19}, #{imsi_v_20}, #{imsi_v_21}, #{imsi_v_22}, #{imsi_d_1}, #{imsi_d_2}, #{imsi_d_3}, #{imsi_d_4}, #{imsi_d_5}, #{imsi_n_1}, #{imsi_n_2}, #{imsi_n_3}, #{imsi_n_4}, #{imsi_n_5} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD SET request_state = #{request_state}, complete_date = SYSDATE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_idx = #{group_idx}

UPDATE CMS_BOARD SET delete_yn = 'N', delete_date = NULL WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_idx IN
#{i}
mapper.select: SELECT A.manage_idx, A.parent_idx, A.board_idx, A.group_idx, A.file_count, A.title, A.imsi_v_1, A.imsi_v_2, A.user_name, A.add_date, A.imsi_v_3, A.imsi_v_4, FS_FN_CODENAME('A0068',A.imsi_v_5) AS imsi_v_5, 0 AS COMMENT_COUNT , SUBSTR(B.board_name, INSTR(B.board_name,'>',-1, 1) +2, LENGTH(B.board_name)) AS board_name FROM CMS_BOARD A, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE B WHERE --A.manage_idx IN ('347', '127', '129', '130', '131', '132', '6', '134', '110', '299', '310','324','325', '128', '328') A.manage_idx IN (select manage_idx from cms_board_manage where board_type = 'CUSTOM_QNA' AND board_use_yn = 'Y') AND A.delete_date IS NULL AND A.manage_idx = B.manage_idx AND A.add_id = #{add_id} AND A.group_depth = 0 ORDER BY B.board_name ASC, A.add_date DESC

SELECT a.manage_idx, a.board_idx, a.board_table, a.b_num, a.b_file1, a.b_file2, a.b_file3, a.b_file4, a.b_file5, b.board_type as board_mode FROM CMS_BOARD a, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE b WHERE a.manage_idx = b.manage_idx AND a.board_table = 'board_11' ORDER BY board_table ASC, board_idx ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD SET preview_img = ( SELECT real_file_name FROM ( SELECT real_file_name FROM CMS_BOARD_FILE WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} AND lower(file_ext_name) IN ('.jpg', '.jpeg', '.gif', '.bmp', '.png') ORDER BY file_idx ) WHERE rownum = 1 ) WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_FILE WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} AND lower(file_ext_name) IN ('.jpg', '.jpeg', '.gif', '.bmp', '.png') ) > 0
UPDATE CMS_BOARD SET approval_count = NVL(approval_count, 0) + 1 WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx}
UPDATE CMS_BOARD SET contrary_count = NVL(contrary_count, 0) + 1 WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT (select menu_idx from cms_menu where manage_idx = a.manage_idx and menu_type = 'BOARD') as menu_idx, a.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE imsi_v_1 IS NOT NULL AND imsi_v_1 = #{imsi_v_1} AND manage_idx = ( SELECT manage_idx FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE WHERE board_type = 'MOVIE' AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' ) ) a

SELECT DISTINCT(START_DATE), SUM(COUNT) AS IMSI_V1 FROM ( SELECT (IMSI_V_1 || '-' || IMSI_V_2) AS START_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY A.BOARD_IDX) AS COUNT FROM CMS_BOARD A, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE B WHERE A.MANAGE_IDX = B.MANAGE_IDX AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'MOVIE' AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) WHERE START_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') GROUP BY ROLLUP(START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT DISTINCT(START_DATE), SUM(COUNT) AS IMSI_V1 FROM ( SELECT IMSI_V_1 AS START_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY A.BOARD_IDX) AS COUNT FROM CMS_BOARD A, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE B WHERE A.MANAGE_IDX = B.MANAGE_IDX AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'MOVIE' AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) WHERE SUBSTR(START_DATE,0,4) = #{start_year} GROUP BY ROLLUP(START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT DISTINCT(START_DATE), SUM(COUNT) AS IMSI_V1 FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(IMSI_V_1,0,4) AS START_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY A.BOARD_IDX) AS COUNT FROM CMS_BOARD A, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE B WHERE A.MANAGE_IDX = B.MANAGE_IDX AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'MOVIE' AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) WHERE SUBSTR(START_DATE,0,4) BETWEEN #{start_year} and #{end_year} GROUP BY ROLLUP(START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT BOARD_NAME, SUM(COUNT) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT A.MANAGE_IDX, A.BOARD_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(B.FILE_DOWNLOAD_COUNT) FROM CMS_BOARD B WHERE A.MANAGE_IDX = B.MANAGE_IDX AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N') AS COUNT FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE A WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND A.BOARD_USE_YN = 'Y' ) GROUP BY ROLLUP(BOARD_NAME) ORDER BY BOARD_NAME DESC

SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, notice_start_date, notice_end_date, title, content, add_id, user_name, user_email, user_phone, user_homepage, user_password, user_ip, user_email_receive_yn, user_sms_receive_yn, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date,secret_yn, preview_img, file_count, content_summary, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5, file_download_count, recommend_count, recommend_email_receive_count, report_state, ebook_url, imsi_v_1, imsi_v_2, imsi_v_3, imsi_v_4, imsi_v_5, imsi_v_6, imsi_v_7, imsi_v_8, imsi_v_9, imsi_v_10, imsi_v_11,imsi_v_12,imsi_v_13,imsi_v_14,imsi_v_15, imsi_v_16,imsi_v_17,imsi_v_18,imsi_v_19,imsi_v_20, imsi_v_21,imsi_v_22, imsi_d_1, imsi_d_2 ,imsi_d_3, imsi_d_4, imsi_d_5, imsi_n_1, imsi_n_2, imsi_n_3, imsi_n_4, imsi_n_5 FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND group_idx = #{group_idx} AND board_idx != #{board_idx} AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn} ORDER BY board_idx ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT REQUEST_STATE FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE add_id = #{add_id} AND manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N' AND GROUP_DEPTH = 0 ) WHERE REQUEST_STATE = '0' OR REQUEST_STATE = '1'
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_idx IN
#{i}
mapper.select:
SELECT manage_idx, RESULT_DATE, SUM(RESULT_COUNT) AS RESULT_COUNT FROM ( SELECT 0 as manage_idx,
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') + ((LEVEL-1)),'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count
TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{start_year}||'-01', 'yyyy-mm'), LEVEL - 1),'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count
TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{start_year}, 'yyyy'), (LEVEL - 1)*12),'yyyy') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24(TO_DATE(#{end_date}) - TO_DATE(#{start_date}) + 1)12#{year_count} UNION SELECT manage_idx,
TO_CHAR(add_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count
TO_CHAR(add_date, 'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count
TO_CHAR(add_date, 'yyyy') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count
FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE 1=1
AND manage_idx in (select manage_idx from cms_board_manage where homepage_id = 'h1')
AND add_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND add_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{start_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND add_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
GROUP BY manage_idx,
TO_CHAR(add_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
TO_CHAR(add_date, 'yyyy-mm')
TO_CHAR(add_date, 'yyyy')
) GROUP BY manage_idx, result_date ORDER BY manage_idx, result_date ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT manage_idx FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE
manage_idx in ( SELECT manage_idx FROM cms_board_manage WHERE
board_type = 'NOTICE' )
AND add_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND delete_yn = 'N'
AND title LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
AND title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword1}||'%'
${logicFunction1} title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword2}||'%'
${logicFunction2} title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword3}||'%'
${logicFunction3} title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword4}||'%'
) A

${pagingTop} SELECT CMS_BOARD_T.*, ( SELECT H.homepage_alias FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_20, ( SELECT H.homepage_alias FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_21, ( SELECT MOD(TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(homepage_id, 'h', '')),8)+1 FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx ) AS imsi_n_1, ( SELECT H.context_path FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_19, ( SELECT MAX(H.menu_idx) FROM CMS_MENU H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = CMS_BOARD_T.manage_idx AND H.manage_idx = M.manage_idx AND H.menu_type = 'BOARD' ) AS imsi_n_2
FROM ( SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, group_idx, parent_idx, group_depth, view_count, notice_yn, title, add_id, content, user_name, user_ip, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date, file_count, preview_img, secret_yn, content_summary, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5, imsi_v_1, imsi_v_2, imsi_v_3, imsi_v_4, imsi_v_5 FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE
manage_idx in ( SELECT manage_idx FROM cms_board_manage WHERE
board_type = 'NOTICE'
)
AND add_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND delete_yn = 'N'
AND title LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
AND title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword1}||'%'
${logicFunction1} title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword2}||'%'
${logicFunction2} title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword3}||'%'
${logicFunction3} title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword4}||'%'
) A START WITH A.parent_idx = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR A.board_idx = A.parent_idx
ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.add_date DESC ) CMS_BOARD_T ${pagingBottom}

SELECT request_state, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = 563
AND category1 = #{category1}
AND group_depth = 0 AND delete_yn = 'N' AND category1 != '0000' AND category1 != '0040' GROUP BY
category1,
request_state
SELECT request_state, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND group_depth = 0 AND delete_yn = #{delete_yn} GROUP BY request_state

SELECT title, REGEXP_REPLACE(content, '<[^>]*>|\&([^;])*;', '') AS content, user_name, getcodeidtocodename('h2', 'B0004', category1) AS category1, getcodeidtocodename('h2', 'B0005', category2) AS category2, getcodeidtocodename('h2', 'B0006',category3) AS category3, TO_CHAR(add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS imsi_v_2 FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = 149 AND TO_CHAR(add_date, 'YYYY') = #{imsi_v_1} AND delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY add_date
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD SET file_download_count = file_download_count + 1 WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.homepage_id, a.manage_idx, a.board_idx, a.title, a.user_name, a.content, a.content_summary, a.add_date, c.menu_idx, getCodeIdToCodeName(#{homepage_id},#{category1Manage},a.category1) as category1_name, preview_img, imsi_v_3, imsi_v_4, imsi_v_2, imsi_v_6, imsi_v_7 FROM CMS_BOARD a, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE b, CMS_MENU c WHERE 1=1 AND a.manage_idx = b.manage_idx AND a.manage_idx = c.manage_idx AND a.delete_yn = 'N' AND a.secret_yn = 'N' AND a.group_depth = 0 AND a.parent_idx = 0 AND b.secret_use_yn = 'N' AND b.board_type IN ('BOOK') AND b.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND c.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND c.menu_type = 'BOARD' AND c.use_yn = 'Y' AND c.view_yn = 'Y' AND a.manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND a.imsi_v_1 = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY a.board_idx DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50

SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, title, category1, preview_img, imsi_v_1, imsi_v_2, imsi_v_3, imsi_v_4, imsi_v_5, imsi_v_6, rank FROM ( SELECT manage_idx, board_idx, title, category1, preview_img, imsi_v_1, imsi_v_2, imsi_v_3, imsi_v_4, imsi_v_5, imsi_v_6, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category1 ORDER by add_date DESC) AS rank FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND imsi_v_1 = #{imsi_v_1} AND delete_yn = 'N' ) WHERE rank <= 6 ORDER BY rank, category1
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD SET delete_yn = 'Y', delete_id = 'administrator', delete_date = SYSDATE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND TO_CHAR(add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12 * #{retention_end_period}), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, user_name, content, add_date FROM GUESTBOOK WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND TO_CHAR(add_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd')
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(guestbook_idx),0)+1 FROM GUESTBOOK
INSERT INTO GUESTBOOK ( guestbook_idx, homepage_id, user_name, content, add_date ) VALUES ( #{guestbook_idx}, #{homepage_id}, #{user_name}, #{content}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GUESTBOOK WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND user_name = #{user_name} AND TO_CHAR(add_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd')
